instruction: Dismiss the cookie or consent banner by clicking 'Accept', 'Accept all', or 'Agree'
Dismiss any privacy, region, or notification modal/overlay by clicking its close button or 'OK'/'Continue'/'No thanks' action
On the job-detail page, click the primary CTA that starts the application: 'Apply', 'Apply Now', or 'Apply Today'
If offered a choice, click 'Apply without an account' or 'Continue as guest' to skip creating an account. Do NOT click 'Continue Later'.
On the Candidate Consent Agreement page, click the 'I Accept' button to agree and proceed. Do NOT click 'I Decline', 'Cancel', or 'Continue Later'.
On the Basic Information page, fill in the First Name field with 'Reginald'
Fill in the Last Name field with 'Reconaldo'
Fill in the Email field with '${RECON_EMAIL}'
Fill in the Mobile Phone field with '5125550123'
Click the 'Yes' answer for the question 'Are you at least 18 years of age?'
Click the 'Yes' answer for the question 'Are you legally authorized to work in the US?'
Click the 'No' answer for the question about requiring visa sponsorship (H-1B, O-1, E-3, TN) to work legally in the US
Click the 'No' answer for the question about common domicile with any employee or relatives at any affiliated facility
Click the 'No' answer for the question 'Have you served in a branch of the US Military?'
Click the 'No' answer for the question 'Are you the spouse of a United States Active Military Member?'
Click the 'Next' button to leave the Basic Information page. Click ONLY the primary 'Next' button — do NOT click 'Back', 'Cancel', or 'Continue Later'.
On the Apply page, upload the test resume PDF using the 'Upload a Resume/CV' control
On the Review page (Contact Details), fill in the Street Address field with '123 Main St'
Fill in the City field with 'Austin'
Select 'United States' in the Country dropdown
Select 'Texas' in the State or State/Region dropdown
Fill in the Postal or Zip code field with '78701'
Click the 'Next' button to leave the Contact Details review sub-step. Click ONLY the primary 'Next' button — do NOT click 'Back', 'Cancel', or 'Continue Later'.

On the Review page, if a pre-existing Work History entry is marked 'Requires Attention' (for example a card labeled 'Company Name - Test Candidate'), click its 'Delete' button to remove that invalid entry so the page can advance. Click the Delete control for the flagged entry, not 'Edit', 'Add', 'Back', or 'Cancel'.
If a modal asks to confirm deleting the work history entry, click the confirm button ('Delete', 'Yes', 'Confirm', or 'OK').
If a Work History or Work Experience entry form is shown with an empty Company or Employer field, fill it with 'General Hospital'
If a Work History or Work Experience entry form is open with its fields filled, click the 'Done' or 'Save' button to confirm the entry (not 'Cancel', 'Delete', or 'Back').
Click the 'Next' button to leave the Work History review sub-step. Click ONLY the primary 'Next' button — do NOT click 'Back', 'Cancel', or 'Continue Later'.
If an Education History or School form is shown, fill in the School or Institution Name field with 'State University'
If an Education History form is shown, fill in the Degree or Field of Study field with 'Nursing'
If an Education History form shows an empty Major or Field of Study field, fill it with 'Nursing'
If an Education History entry form is open with its fields filled, click the 'Done' or 'Save' button to confirm the entry (not 'Cancel', 'Delete', or 'Back').
Click the 'Next' button to leave the Education History review sub-step. Click ONLY the primary 'Next' button — do NOT click 'Back', 'Cancel', or 'Continue Later'.
On the Disability Self-Identify page, select 'I do not wish to provide this information' in the 'Please select your disability type' dropdown
Click the 'Next' button to leave the Disability Self-Identify page. Click ONLY the primary 'Next' button — do NOT click 'Back', 'Cancel', or 'Continue Later'.
On the Veterans Self-Identify page, select 'I do not wish to answer' in the 'Are you a Protected Veteran?' dropdown
Click the 'Next' button to leave the Veterans Self-Identify page. Click ONLY the primary 'Next' button — do NOT click 'Back', 'Cancel', or 'Continue Later'.
On the COMPENSATION landing page, if a required field asks for your expected base hourly rate (or expected pay/salary), fill it with '45' BEFORE clicking Next (the salary is required to advance).

On the COMPENSATION landing page, click the 'Next' button to continue to the Job-Related Questions page where the screening questions are shown. Click ONLY the primary 'Next' button — do NOT click 'Back', 'Cancel', or 'Continue Later'.
On the COMPENSATION / Job-Related Questions page, if a required field asks for your expected base hourly rate (or expected pay/salary) that is still empty, fill it with '45'

On the COMPENSATION / Job-Related Questions page, for 'Do you currently or have you ever worked at HCA or an HCA affiliated company?' select 'No, I do not currently or have never worked for HCA or an HCA affiliated company.'
On the COMPENSATION / Job-Related Questions page, for 'What is your highest level of nursing education?' select 'Bachelors of Science in Nursing completed'
For 'Are you currently licensed to work as a Registered Nurse in this state?' select 'Yes'
For 'How many years of clinical experience do you have as a Registered Nurse (all specialties)?' select '5-7 Years'
For 'In which settings have you worked as a Registered Nurse during the past three years?' select 'Hospital'
For 'Which best describes your current or most recent experience?' select 'Emergency Department'
For 'How many years of experience do you have in an Emergency Room setting?' select '5-7 years'
For 'Which of the following certifications do you currently possess?' select or check 'Basic Life Support (BLS)'

For any remaining required job-related, screening, EEO, self-identification, or voluntary question that still blocks the Next button, provide a reasonable answer, select the first non-decline option, or check the acknowledgement box
Click the 'Next' button to leave the COMPENSATION / Job-Related Questions page. Click ONLY the primary 'Next' button — do NOT click 'Back', 'Cancel', or 'Continue Later'.
On the SELF-IDENTIFICATION page, scroll down through the page to reveal the Race/Ethnic Identification and gender questions if they are not yet visible
On the SELF-IDENTIFICATION page, click the 'I Do Not Wish To Disclose' answer for the question 'Race/Ethnic Identification'
Click the 'Withhold' answer for the question 'Please select your gender:'

For any remaining self-identification, EEO, or voluntary question with a dropdown or radio that still blocks Next, select 'I do not wish to answer', 'Prefer not to answer', 'Withhold', or 'I Do Not Wish To Disclose'
Click the 'Next' button to leave the SELF-IDENTIFICATION page. Click ONLY the primary 'Next' button — do NOT click 'Back', 'Cancel', or 'Continue Later'.
Click the final submit control to submit the application: 'Submit' or 'Submit Application'. Click ONLY the submit button — do NOT click 'Back', 'Cancel', 'Save', or 'Continue Later'.
Dismiss the cookie or consent banner by clicking 'Accept' or 'Accept all'
Dismiss the 'we recognize you' or 'welcome back' modal by clicking 'Not me' or 'Continue as new' so the form starts in a clean state
Dismiss any pre-form modal or overlay by clicking its close button or 'OK'/'Continue' action
Navigate to the application form by clicking the first 'Apply now' link visible on the page
Fill in the First Name field with 'Reginald'
Fill in the Legal First Name field with 'Reginald'
Fill in the Legal Last Name field with 'Reconaldo'
Fill in the Email field with '${RECON_EMAIL}'
Fill in the Phone number field with '+1 208-377-2156'
Upload the test resume PDF
Fill in the Postal code field with '83704'
Fill in the City field with 'Boise'
If a field labeled 'Address Line', 'Address Line 1', 'Street Address', or 'Address' is visible, fill it with '123 Main St'
Click the 'Continue to external site' button
Click the 'No thanks, just apply' button to skip account creation and proceed directly to the application form
Fill in the Last Name field with 'Reconaldo'
Click the 'No' label for 'Have you ever been previously employed with Presbyterian Healthcare Services?'
Click the 'No' label for 'Are you currently a Presbyterian Contingent Worker?'
Select 'Not Applicable' in the dropdown for 'If you are a former Presbyterian employee, confirm prior employment history'
Click the 'No' label for 'Have you signed and are currently subject to an existing or prior non-compete agreement?'
Click the 'No' label for 'Have you been listed on OIG, GSA, or OFAC excluded provider lists?'
Click the 'Yes' label for 'Are you legally authorized to work in the U.S?'
Select 'No' in the dropdown for 'Will you now, or in the future, require sponsorship?'
Click the 'Yes' label for 'Do you wish to be considered for other employment opportunities at Presbyterian?'
Fill in the salary requirement text input with 'Negotiable'
Select 'Yes' in the dropdown for 'Are you willing to relocate to New Mexico?'
Select the first non-placeholder option in the 'What Shift do you prefer?' dropdown
Select 'Full Time' in the 'What type of employment status do you prefer?' dropdown
Select 'Not Declared' or the closest non-disclosing option in the Gender dropdown
Select the closest non-disclosing option in the Ethnicity dropdown
Click the 'No' checkbox for 'Please indicate if you are Hispanic or Latino'
Select the closest non-disclosing option in the Veteran status dropdown
Click the 'I do not want to answer' label for Voluntary Self-Identification of Disability
Select the current date option in the 'Please enter today's date' dropdown
If a County field is visible and the field is empty, fill it with the candidate's county (a typical county like Ada, Dane, or whatever matches the job's hospital city/state)
Click the Continue button to proceed to the next step of the application
Click the 'No' label for 'Have you ever been previously employed with Presbyterian Healthcare Services?'
Click the 'No' label for 'Are you currently a Presbyterian Contingent Worker?'
Select 'Not Applicable' in the dropdown for 'If you are a former Presbyterian employee, confirm prior employment history'
Click the 'No' label for 'Have you signed and are currently subject to an existing or prior non-compete agreement?'
Click the 'No' label for 'Have you been listed on OIG, GSA, or OFAC excluded provider lists?'
Click the 'Yes' label for 'Are you legally authorized to work in the U.S?'
Select 'No' in the dropdown for 'Will you now, or in the future, require sponsorship?'
Select 'No' in the dropdown for 'If you do not currently require sponsorship, would you consider in the future?'
Click the 'Yes' label for 'Do you wish to be considered for other employment opportunities at Presbyterian Healthcare Services?'
Fill in the salary requirement text input with 'Negotiable'
Select 'Yes' in the dropdown for 'Are you willing to relocate to New Mexico?'
Select the first non-placeholder option in the 'What Shift do you prefer?' dropdown
Select 'Full Time' in the 'What type of employment status do you prefer?' dropdown
Select 'Not Declared' or the closest non-disclosing option in the Gender dropdown
Select the closest non-disclosing option in the Ethnicity dropdown
Click the 'No' checkbox for 'Please indicate if you are Hispanic or Latino'
Select the closest non-disclosing option in the Veteran status dropdown
Click the 'I do not want to answer' label for Voluntary Self-Identification of Disability
Select the current date option in the 'Please enter today's date' dropdown
Click the Submit button to submit the application form
Click the 'No' label for the radio button 'Are you related to a current Encompass Health (formerly HealthSouth) employee?'
Click the 'No' label for the radio button 'Have your previously worked for Encompass Health (formerly HealthSouth or its affiliates)?'
Click the 'No' label for the radio button 'Have you ever received sanctions, been on probation or had limitations placed on any of your professional licenses or registrations?'
Click the 'No' label for the radio button 'Have you ever been terminated from or asked to resign from a position?'

Click the 'No' label for the radio button 'Have you ever been excluded or otherwise made ineligible to participate in any federal program, including any health care program (e.g. Medicare, Medicaid)?'
Click the 'No' label for the radio button asking whether you require Encompass Health visa sponsorship to work in the United States
Click the 'Yes' label for the radio button 'Can you present proof of your legal eligibility to work in the United States?'
Click the 'Yes' label for the radio button 'Can you perform all the required job functions and/or duties of the job for which you are applying with or without a reasonable accommodation?'
Click the Submit button to submit the application form
Select the closest non-disclosing option in the Gender dropdown
Select the 'Yes, I have healthcare work experience' radio button
Upload the test resume PDF
Click the Continue button to advance the form
If an Address Line or Street Address field is visible, fill it with the test candidate's address line
If a City field is visible, fill it with the test candidate's city
If a State or Province dropdown is visible, select the test candidate's state
If a Postal Code or ZIP field is visible, fill it with the test candidate's postal code
If a Country dropdown is visible, select the test candidate's country
If a County field is visible inside the Address group and the field is not already filled, fill it with the test candidate's county
If a question asks whether you are legally authorized to work in the U.S., and 'Yes' is not already selected, select 'Yes'
If a question asks whether you require visa sponsorship or a visa type and the field is not already filled, enter 'NA' or select 'No' as appropriate
If a question asks whether you have signed or are subject to a non-compete agreement, and 'No' is not already selected, select 'No'
If a question asks whether you have been listed on OIG, GSA, or OFAC excluded provider lists, and 'No' is not already selected, select 'No'

If a question asks whether you are a former employee or asks to confirm prior employment history is on your resume, and an answer is not already selected, select 'Not Applicable' or 'No' as appropriate
If a question asks for a current Non-Employee, Contractor, Student, Instructor, Locum, or Volunteer ID and the field is not already filled, enter 'NA'
If a question asks whether you wish to be considered for other employment opportunities, and 'Yes' is not already selected, select 'Yes'
If a question asks whether you are related to a current employee or have a relative at the company, and 'No' is not already selected, select 'No'
If a question asks whether you have previously worked for the employer (e.g. Encompass Health, formerly HealthSouth, or its affiliates) and 'No' is not already selected, select 'No'
If a question asks whether you have ever received sanctions, been on probation, or had limitations placed on your license, and 'No' is not already selected, select 'No'
If a question asks whether you have ever been terminated from or asked to resign from a position, and 'No' is not already selected, select 'No'
If a question asks whether you have ever been excluded or made ineligible to participate in any federal program, and 'No' is not already selected, select 'No'
If a question asks whether you can present proof of your legal eligibility to work in the United States, and 'Yes' is not already selected, select 'Yes'
If a question asks whether you can perform all the required job functions and/or duties of the job for which you are applying, and 'Yes' is not already selected, select 'Yes'
If a Gender question is visible and no option is selected, select 'Prefer not to say' or the closest non-disclosing option available
If an Education or Degree section shows an 'Add Answer' button (used to add a degree entry to a repeatable group), click the 'Add Answer' button to reveal the degree dropdown(s)
If a Degree or 'Highest Degree' dropdown is now visible (after clicking Add Answer), select 'Nursing' or the closest available degree option
If an Education Level dropdown is now visible (after clicking Add Answer), select 'Bachelor's Degree' or the closest available level option

If MULTIPLE Education modals are stacked open on top of each other (from duplicate Add Answer clicks during cascade retries), click the Close button or X button of the topmost / second / outer modal first so exactly one Education modal remains open with the Degree and Education level dropdowns filled

If an Education modal is open with Degree and Education level dropdowns filled in, click the 'Save' button (the primary action button inside the modal — NOT the Close button, NOT the X button) to commit the degree entry to the form so the parent questions-container loses its ng-invalid state
If an E-Signature or 'Full Name' signature field is visible and empty, fill it with the test candidate's full name

If a Voluntary Disclosures section is visible with Ethnicity, Race, or Hispanic-or-Latino questions and no option is selected, choose 'Decline to answer' / 'I do not wish to disclose' / 'Prefer not to say' or the closest non-disclosing option for each question

If a Veteran Status question is visible and no option is selected, choose 'I prefer not to answer' / 'I do not wish to self-identify' / 'I am not a protected veteran' or the closest non-disclosing option

If a Disability Status question is visible and no option is selected, choose 'I do not wish to answer' / 'I don't wish to answer' / 'No, I do not have a disability' or the closest non-disclosing option
If a salary requirement, desired compensation, or expected salary field is visible and empty, fill it with 'Negotiable' (for text inputs) or '0' (for strictly-numeric inputs)

If a relocation question is visible (e.g. 'Are you willing to relocate', 'Will you relocate to <city/state>', 'I already live in <state>') and no option is selected, select 'Yes' for willing-to-relocate questions or 'Yes' for 'I already live in' questions
If a Shift Preference dropdown or radio group is visible and no option is selected, select 'Any' / 'Day' / 'No Preference' or the first non-placeholder option available

If an Employment Status, Position Type, or 'What type of employment status do you prefer' question is visible (Full Time / Part Time / PRN / Per Required Need / Contract) and no option is selected, select 'Full Time' or the first non-placeholder option available

Before submitting, verify each previously-filled identity field still carries the value the flow filled earlier. If the First Name input is empty or marked invalid (look for class 'ng-invalid' on the input or its container), re-fill it with 'Reginald'. If the Last Name input is empty or invalid, re-fill it with 'Reconaldo'. If the Email input is empty or invalid, re-fill it with '${RECON_EMAIL}'. If the Phone Number input is empty or invalid, re-fill it with '+1 208-377-2156' (do NOT use 310-867-5309 or any 555 number — AppCast's uapp-phone-input validator rejects them with 'Please provide correct phone number').
If a Years of experience dropdown is visible, select the first non-placeholder option in it
Click the Continue button to proceed to the next step of the form
Select the first non-placeholder option in the Years of experience dropdown
Click the Continue button to proceed to the next step of the form
Click the Continue button to proceed to the next step
On multi-page variants, click the 'Next' or 'Continue' button to advance to the next form page

If a date input field labeled 'earliest available start date', 'discharge date', or similar is visible, fill it with today's date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. '2026-06-14'). Use the date input element directly; the AppCast widget is a standard HTML5 <input type='date'>, not a spinbutton or Material-style wheel widget. The HTML5 spec requires YYYY-MM-DD for programmatic .value writes regardless of how the browser displays the date.

Click the 'Next', 'Continue', or 'Save and Continue' button to advance from the Personal Info section to Job Application Questions
If a question asks whether you are legally authorized to work in the United States, select 'Yes'
If a question asks whether you can present proof of your legal eligibility to work in the United States, select 'Yes'
If a question asks whether you can perform all the required job functions and/or duties of the job for which you are applying, select 'Yes'
If a question asks whether you have previously worked for Encompass Health (formerly HealthSouth) or its affiliates, select 'No'
If a question asks whether you have ever received sanctions, been on probation, or had limitations placed on your license, select 'No'
If a question asks whether you have ever been terminated from or asked to resign from a position, select 'No'
If a question asks whether you have ever been excluded or made ineligible to participate in any federal program, select 'No'
Click the 'Next', 'Continue', or 'Save and Continue' button to advance from Job Application Questions to the Education section
If a Degree or Education field is visible, select 'Nursing' or 'Bachelor's Degree' or the closest available option
Click the 'Next', 'Continue', or 'Save and Continue' button to advance from the Education section to More About You
If a Gender question is visible in a Diversity or Voluntary Self-Identification section, select 'I do not wish to answer' or 'Prefer not to say' or the equivalent decline option
If a Race/Ethnicity question is visible, select 'I do not wish to answer' or the equivalent decline option
If a Veteran Status question is visible, select 'I am not a veteran' or 'I do not wish to answer' or the equivalent decline option
If a Disability Status question is visible, select 'I do not wish to answer' or the equivalent decline option
Click the 'Next', 'Continue', or 'Save and Continue' button to advance from More About You to the Summary section
If an E-Signature section is visible with a text field for your full name, fill it with 'Reginald Reconaldo'
If a legal disclaimer with an 'I Accept' or 'I agree' button or checkbox is visible, click it to accept
Click the 'Submit Application', 'Submit', 'Apply', or 'Confirm' button to finalize and submit the job application
